who: procurement managers at small marketing agencies processing 10-20 invoices/month
offer: For procurement managers at small marketing agencies processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes late payments, leading to service disruptions. We automate invoice reconciliation instead of manual invoice reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: manual reconciliation of vendor invoices leading to errors and delays
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try exception reporting dashboard for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing vendor data
Fewer steps required in onboarding process
